name: plans-md
description: Plans.md helps Codex organize substantial work with concrete plan.md and record.md files.

interface.shortDescription: Create concrete plan.md and record.md files
interface.longDescription: Use PLANS.md to organize substantial coding, research, design, debugging, and review work with durable plan.md and record.md files written in specific, skimmable prose.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use PLANS.md to create or update plan.md and record.md for this task.
